subject: Joint Distributions
question: A device runs until either of two components fails, at which point the device stops running. The joint density function of the lifetimes of the two components, both measured in hours, is $f_{XY}(x, y) = \begin{cases} \frac{x+y}{8} & 0 < x, y < 2 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise} \end{cases}$ What is the probability that the device fails during its first hour of operation?
